title: LuxDermis Renewal Serum
content:
Most Vitamin C serums oxidize before they reach your skin. LuxDermis uses a stabilized ascorbic acid derivative — a form that stays active in the formula and absorbs effectively into the dermis where collagen synthesis begins.

The clinical result: 94% of participants in our 8-week trial saw a measurable reduction in fine lines. Fragrance-free, dermatologist co-developed, COSMOS certified organic, Leaping Bunny cruelty-free certified. Airless pump — 18-month shelf life.
excerpt: Clinical-grade Vitamin C stability that actually reaches the dermis — 94% of users saw measurable fine line reduction in 8 weeks.
